name: release-expansion-ui
description: Release UI matrix for mobile jump, fist aura/alignment, shop pages, pets, tasks, Honor, Spin, and legacy Daily masking.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation local root=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart local y=root.Position.Y local invoked=a:Invoke('Jump') task.wait(.24) return H:JSONEncode({ok=invoked==true and root.Position.Y-y>1,delta=root.Position.Y-y,state=p.Character.Humanoid:GetState().Name})
local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') return c:Invoke('GrantPremiumFist','Celestial Titan Fist').ok

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local c=game.Players.LocalPlayer.Character local h=c:FindFirstChild('RightHand') or c:FindFirstChild('Right Arm') local g=c:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet') local parts,emitters,highlights,welds,maxDistance=0,0,0,0,0 if g then for _,d in ipairs(g:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('BasePart') then parts+=1 maxDistance=math.max(maxDistance,(d.Position-h.Position).Magnitude) elseif d:IsA('ParticleEmitter') then emitters+=1 elseif d:IsA('Highlight') then highlights+=1 elseif d:IsA('WeldConstraint') then welds+=1 end end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=g~=nil and parts>0 and welds>0 and emitters>=2 and highlights>=1 and maxDistance<2.6,parts=parts,welds=welds,emitters=emitters,highlights=highlights,maxDistance=maxDistance})

steps.label: top fist is wrist aligned with tier aura

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation a:Invoke('OpenTab','Fists') a:Invoke('OpenShopPage','Premium') task.wait(.1) local s=g.GameMenu.FunctionalHeroShop local premium=0 for _,x in ipairs(s:GetChildren()) do if x:IsA('Frame') and x.Name:find('ShopCard') then premium+=1 end end a:Invoke('OpenShopPage','Robux') task.wait(.1) local robux=0 for _,x in ipairs(s:GetChildren()) do if x:IsA('Frame') and x.Name:find('ShopCard') then robux+=1 end end return H:JSONEncode({ok=s.Visible and premium==3 and robux==4,premium=premium,robux=robux})

steps.label: premium and Robux shop pages render

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local a=g.PunchWallClientAutomation local found={} for _,tab in ipairs({'Pets','Honor','Tasks'}) do a:Invoke('OpenTab',tab) task.wait(.08) local text='' for _,d in ipairs(g.GameMenu:GetDescendants()) do if d:IsA('TextLabel') then text..=' '..string.upper(d.Text or '') end end found[tab]=tab=='Pets' and text:find('SIDEKICK LAB',1,true)~=nil or tab=='Honor' and text:find('HONOR',1,true)~=nil or tab=='Tasks' and text:find('HERO PRIZE SPIN',1,true)~=nil end a:Invoke('OpenSpin') task.wait(.08) local spin=g.HeroSpinModal.Visible a:Invoke('CloseMenus') local q=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD:FindFirstChild('QuestLegacyProgressMask',true) local masked=q and (q.Position.Y.Scale+q.Size.Y.Scale)>=.9 return H:JSONEncode({ok=found.Pets and found.Honor and found.Tasks and spin and masked,pets=found.Pets,honor=found.Honor,tasks=found.Tasks,spin=spin,masked=masked})

steps.label: pets Honor tasks Spin and Daily mask are complete
